-- translated/fortest_globals/gosim_globals.go --
// Code generated by gosim. DO NOT EDIT.
package fortestglobals

import "github.com/jellevandenhooff/gosim/gosimruntime"

type Globals struct {
	stateNames [3]string
}

var globals gosimruntime.Global[Globals]

func initializers(initializeShared bool) {
	G().stateNames = [...]string{"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}
}
func G() *Globals { return globals.Get() }
func init() {
	gosimruntime.RegisterPackage("test/fortest_globals").Globals = &gosimruntime.Globals{Globals: &globals, Initializers: initializers}
}
-- translated/fortest_globals/gosim_globals_for_test.go --
// Code generated by gosim. DO NOT EDIT.
package fortestglobals

import "github.com/jellevandenhooff/gosim/gosimruntime"

type GlobalsForTest struct {
	testCounter int
}

var globalsForTest gosimruntime.Global[GlobalsForTest]

func initializersForTest(initializeShared bool) {}
func GForTest() *GlobalsForTest                 { return globalsForTest.Get() }
func init() {
	gosimruntime.RegisterPackage("test/fortest_globals").ForTest = &gosimruntime.Globals{Globals: &globalsForTest, Initializers: initializersForTest}
}
-- translated/fortest_globals/gosim_meta_test.go --
// Code generated by gosim. DO NOT EDIT.
package fortestglobals_test

import (
	testing_original "testing"

	"github.com/jellevandenhooff/gosim/gosimruntime"
	"translated/github.com/jellevandenhooff/gosim/internal_/hooks/go123"
)

func init() {
	gosimruntime.SetAllTests([]gosimruntime.Test{})
}
func TestMain(m *testing_original.M) {
	gosimruntime.TestMain(go123.Runtime())
}
-- pkg.go --
package fortestglobals

// stateNames is a composite-literal global in a base file.  Its initializer
// appears in TypesInfo.InitOrder for both the Base and ForTest variants.
var stateNames = [...]string{"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

func StateName(s int) string {
	return stateNames[s]
}
-- translated/fortest_globals/pkg.go --
// Code generated by gosim. DO NOT EDIT.
package fortestglobals

func StateName(s int) string {
	return G().stateNames[s]
}
-- pkg_test.go --
package fortestglobals

// testCounter is a mutable global in a _test.go file.  Its presence causes
// makeDetgoGlobalsFile to run for PackageKindForTest.  Before the fix, that
// function iterated TypesInfo.InitOrder (which included the base-file
// stateNames initializer) and dereferenced a nil dstMap node, panicking with
// "interface conversion: interface is nil, not dst.Expr".
var testCounter int
-- translated/fortest_globals/pkg_test.go --
// Code generated by gosim. DO NOT EDIT.
package fortestglobals
